title: Differentiate squared error
text:
For:
$$r_i=y_i-	heta_1$$ $$x_{1,i}-	heta_2$$ $$x_{2,i}$$
we have:
$$ rac{d}{d	heta_1}(r_i**{2})=2r_i rac{dr_i}{d	heta_1}$$

Simplify the partial derivative after this point.

title: Don’t forget the regularization term
text: The derivative of the regularization term is:\n$$\frac{d}{d\theta_1}\left[\frac{\lambda}{2}\theta_1**{2}\right]=\lambda\theta_1$$

title: Sign check
text: Because $$\frac{d r_i}{dtheta_1}=-x1_i$$, the gradient contribution from the data term has a leading negative sign.
